description:
You are a platform engineer reviewing the JSON output of a freshly-finished CI/CD run.  
A single artifact already exists on the filesystem:

  • /home/user/ci/pipeline_payload.json

Your goal is to perform a one-shot “validate-and-summarise” operation using a single terminal command that:

1. Uses jq to check that BOTH of the following are true inside /home/user/ci/pipeline_payload.json  
   a. .pipeline.status equals the string "succeeded"  
   b. the string "deploy" is present somewhere inside .pipeline.stages (an array)

2. Creates a brand-new plain-text file named  
   /home/user/ci/validation_summary.txt  
   in the exact format shown below.

Output format (exactly three lines, no extra whitespace):

VALIDATION_PASSED
pipeline_id=<numeric-id>
deploy_present=true

Where <numeric-id> is the integer value found at .pipeline.id.

If EITHER condition in step 1 fails, the summary file must instead contain exactly these two lines:

VALIDATION_FAILED
reason=<free-text-description-of-what-failed>

Notes & constraints:

• Use only one shell command (you may chain commands with &&, ||, pipes, subshells, redirection, etc., but everything must be executed by submitting one line to the terminal).  
• Do not open an editor. The summary file must be created purely from the command line.  
• The test harness will inspect /home/user/ci/validation_summary.txt to verify:
  – that the file exists,  
  – that its contents match one of the two strict layouts shown above,  
  – and, for a PASS, that the pipeline_id field matches the JSON value and deploy_present is “true”.

When you are finished, /home/user/ci/validation_summary.txt should be the only file you have created or modified. Everything else on disk must remain untouched.
truth:
Initial file already present before the agent starts:

File: /home/user/ci/pipeline_payload.json  
Contents (exact bytes, newline at EOF):

{
  "pipeline": {
    "id": 42,
    "status": "succeeded",
    "stages": ["build", "test", "deploy"],
    "commit": {
      "hash": "a1b2c3d4",
      "author": "devops"
    }
  }
}

Correct outcome expected by the grader:

File that MUST be produced: /home/user/ci/validation_summary.txt  
Expected contents (exact, newline at EOF):

VALIDATION_PASSED
pipeline_id=42
deploy_present=true

(The test harness will fail the task if the file does not exist, is misplaced, or its content deviates—even in whitespace—from the above.)
